jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at PharmEasy
jsonLd.description:
PharmEasy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About PharmEasy:
PharmEasy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy!
